form.formComment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fifth in a Mix 5 on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Farmor Rogue, beaten 6 lengths (24.46). Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Inside draw could be an advantage. Last start finished fifth in a Mix 5 on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Farmor Rogue, beaten 6 lengths (24.46). Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked entering the back straight and gave ground.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.75 lengths over 407m at this track in a handy (24.00), beating Vanzant Hayze. Has clocked a slick 23.79 Best Time here at the trip. Sound prospects.

form.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Wangaroa Wally at this track last start over 407m (24.05). Has to be respected.

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (20.08) over 366m at Capalaba. Tricky draw to overcome. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors last time in a Grade 5 at this track when a 1.3 lengths second but did run a solid 23.72 over the 407m trip. Can slot into the minors again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (19.44) at Q Straight in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

form.formComment: Hasn't been that impressive recently but he does have good record over this track and distance. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last five starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Grade 5 on March 29 over 407m at this track behind Cody's Star beaten 10 lengths (23.88). Hit the frame last time but will need to improve further.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on April 1 over 407m at this track behind Mr. Williams beaten 11 lengths (24.78). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.
